name: if-test-string-equality
script:
status=ready
if test "$status" = ready; then echo exists; else echo missing; fi

name: for-loop-emits-each-item
script: for item in alpha beta gamma; do echo "item:$item"; done

name: while-loop-counts-up
script:
i=0
while test "$i" -lt 3; do echo "count:$i"; i=$((i + 1)); done
